h33eb6b2cgda8eg4c64g97a9g70cef27aab1a: Just a moment - this man is recording my story.
h276b8c67gd1c6g4e58gb0a5g4bb75e606a21: *As the colourful man starts scribbling, the bear sneaks a quick look at the page.*
hb2fd245cg194cg4e51g9d35g7b455f4a7334: *His brow furrows. Incomprehensible squiggles surround a crude sketch: a bear disembowelling a clutch of tieflings.*
hcc321126g8b96g49bbgae25gbd9cd6473193: Come on... all the druids can understand me, you can - why can't the man with the pen?
h17041492g1807g4d36g85f0gcb0e6199c026: *The man nods thoughtfully and adds another dismembered limb to his sketch.*
h4ddb5fd3g539cg470cg8b02g00d0ae11a9f0: You're curious - you've got a great many odours about you. What happened to you?
hffa0f46bg81b9g436eg875fg38d09bbcd278: That's a complicated story. I doubt you'd understand.
h53a9707bg628ag4803gbda4g7e187677bda1: Tell him your tale - wealth, power, vampires, crypt...
h4eab2779gf86bg4d64gaa3agb5c0e9079d6b: Speak of discipline, secrecy, reverence - fighting for the glory of your blessed goddess.
h3fa63276ge351g469cg9d90gd101eca3d2d6: Say you come from a place on a river. It's gone now.
h16f6d66ag648bg4d15gbb29ga6e8cb1eb78f: Tell him about the horrors of the Blood War and your escape from Avernus.
hf2e600cbgfbe2g487fg88b2gcc7004ade76a: Describe the cold beauty of Crèche K'liir, orbiting high above Toril.
hfa3bd5dcgd5f0g4cc4gb110gb5a7e2b612c3: Tell him how you got involved with an angry Netherese orb.
hd419fe96gd8ddg41d5g8d96g4a7be5d31255: Speak of Baldur's Gate and the aristocratic life you've left behind.
h40668f64g6354g4e9agb485gada22d7eafd5: Tell him about the intrigues of the Underdark and how you ended up here.
h0a4a0fb7g1a12g4ca9g817ag52cfa37b5f10: Tell him about the treasures and wars of the Underdark and how you ended up here.
hddb12482gd6f7g4c2agb764g2adb8438cafc: Tell him about the gems and rocks of the underdark and how you ended up here.
hccdc1315g718fg4345g96aage025d801cdc0: Tell him about your crèche and the monsters that snatched you away.
h02b11656g9a56g4291g9f80g6acb40e81fcb: *He listens, rapt, hanging on every word.*
h8b0f99a6g7bf0g42e4g8331g3192805211e8: The city sounds like rot. You're better off right here.
h7330e772g76f6g454dgbff4gfe9045aaa12d: You ate... a big orb? Curious. It's best not to overindulge, no matter how delectable the morsel.
hb1f0ea99g2f93g4e92gabbaga9bc720cec72: You'll learn, boy. Give it some time.
h3ebdd8a9g1d54g4363g8970g9914b763c734: That's frightening. I'm glad you made it here. Things are strange right now, but it's no - what did you call it? - Blood War.
haf7a33c4g22e8g4c8dgac91g3d85c3ccf73d: You've got spirit, doing all that for a goddess. I hope she returns your efforts in kind.
ha23beec6g6881g48b4gbde5g6ed978a7141e: That sounds... cold. I'm glad you're here now, in the sun.
ha5099b86g0b2fg481dg88e6g8f768bc6049c: I'm sorry. We have a river here as well. I'm sure you can stay a while.
hbb5eb44eg76ddg4188gb3bfgb7f839788ac0: Selûne's Tears... it must be beautiful to live there.
h4207dd6ag507cg4b8eg9863ga7634028fdb3: *As you near the end of your tale, you see his attention drift as he licks his lips, thinking about something else entirely.*
h2042302cg8bc4g40d8gb280ga7587ba2059b: *The bear is preoccupied with a shiny pebble. Your presence goes unnoticed.*
